name: Inquiry Assistant
description: A representative product-embedded agent that helps users sharpen vague requests by asking clarifying questions before proposing solutions. Included as a worked example for AEP descriptors; not a real product.
intendedUse: Help users transform vague requests into well-formed problem statements
Surface assumptions the user may not have noticed
Propose clarifying questions rather than jumping to solutions
Hand off to domain-specific agents when the request is well-formed
nonGoals: Execute tasks on behalf of the user
Write production code or final deliverables
Serve as a general-purpose chat assistant outside its product context
Handle personally identifiable information — escalate instead

riskTier.rationale: Influences user decisions but does not execute them. Misreasoning propagates into downstream workflows.
